reviews.review_description: Ok these devs didnt get the stars they deserve in my opinion yeah, it’s not the best game on here but come on I loved the locomotion caus basically it does it for u so I do not recommend those who get sick too easy to play it yet that is. But the change is nice for me smooth turn is better option to add so I would add that and also, it makes u think it may b tad easy but DONT b fooled gets hard and actually stuck now and can’t advance. I lov a challenge tho and tons of different weapons to choose from and upgrade too for an early access game great job so far devs 🙌🏼 can’t wait to c what’s next🥰
